            API_QUERY_RESULT,
            params={"model_id": 7, "task_id": task_id or self.task_id},

self.session.post(
                    self.translate_endpoint,
                    params=params,
                    headers=self.headers,
                    json=texts_to_translate,
                    timeout=self.timeout,
                )

self.session.get(
                    self.endpoint,
                    params={"tl": target_lang, "sl": "auto", "q": text},
                    headers=self.headers,
                    timeout=self.timeout,
                )
